name: 30m Persistence Reclaim
description: Continuation pack for 25-30% follow-through tests. It leans on the only experimental 30m shapes that have repeated in the pump-only lab, then pairs them with a broader 4h quality control.

recipes.name: pump_price_strength_30m
recipes.description: Pump graduates with sustained 30m price strength after the first post-grad burst.

recipes.name: pump_volume_reclaim_30m
recipes.description: Pump graduates reclaiming 30m flow with enough trade count to avoid thin one-print spikes.
